entry.title: New: BILL055(25) (Honolulu) — PUBLISH
entry.content:
RELATING TO MULTI-FAMILY RENTAL HOUSING PROGRAM FEES.

Creates a Multi-Family Rental Housing Program account within the Housing Development Special Fund, moneys from which must be expended solely for the purpose of operating the Multi-Family Rental Housing Program. Creates fees for the Multi-Family Rental Housing Program that must be deposited into the Multi-Family Rental Housing Program account. Specifies that the Director of Housing and Land Management, instead of the Director of Community Services, is authorized to adopt rules for the Multi Family Rental Housing Program.

Latest action: Final reading notice published in the Honolulu Star-Advertiser.

View on the council site
